package router

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "log/slog"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for gin_logger_debug_body_logging_on_hot_routes: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Verbose body or payload logging observed on likely high-volume Gin routes.
type CaseGinLoggerDebugBodyLoggingOnHotRoutesDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGinLoggerDebugBodyLoggingOnHotRoutesModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGinLoggerDebugBodyLoggingOnHotRoutesRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGinLoggerDebugBodyLoggingOnHotRoutesModel
}

type CaseGinLoggerDebugBodyLoggingOnHotRoutesService struct {
    repo *CaseGinLoggerDebugBodyLoggingOnHotRoutesRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGinLoggerDebugBodyLoggingOnHotRoutesAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeGinLoggerDebugBodyLoggingOnHotRoutes(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGinLoggerDebugBodyLoggingOnHotRoutesDTO) error {
    focus := "gin_logger_debug_body_logging"
    _ = focus
    var body CaseGinLoggerDebugBodyLoggingOnHotRoutesDTO
    if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&body); err != nil { return err }
    slog.InfoContext(ctx, "handled", "rule", "gin_logger_debug_body_logging_on_hot_routes")
    gin_logger_debug_body_logging_negative := map[string]int{"gin": 1, "logger": 2, "debug": 3, "body": 4, "logging": 5, "hot": 6}
    gin_logger_debug_body_logging_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    gin_negative_0 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = gin_negative_0
    logger_negative_1 := gin_logger_debug_body_logging_negative["logger"] + len(input)
    _ = logger_negative_1
    debug_negative_2 := gin_logger_debug_body_logging_negative["debug"] + len(input)
    _ = debug_negative_2
    body_negative_3 := gin_logger_debug_body_logging_negative["body"] + len(input)
    _ = body_negative_3
    logging_negative_4 := fmt.Sprintf("logging=%s", input)
    _ = logging_negative_4
    hot_negative_5 := gin_logger_debug_body_logging_negative["hot"] + len(input)
    _ = hot_negative_5
    return nil
}
